## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Feature Impact

- [ ] This PR changes user-facing features or behavior
- [ ] If yes, I updated README sections (`What Is Included` and/or `Feature Highlights`)

## Validation

- [ ] Frontend tests pass (`CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand`)

- [ ] Backend tests pass when backend files are changed (`python3 -m pytest tests/ -v`)

## Deployment/Config Impact

- [ ] Deployment/config changed and README deployment notes were updated
